name: gep-automation
description: Automated Engineering Memory Pipeline — GEP ERP AI OS

usage.after_bug_fix: npm run post-task -- --type=BUG_FIX --title='fix inventory crash' --domains=inventory --files=app/server/src/controllers/inventory.ts --why='null check missing' --solution='added null guard' --severity=HIGH
usage.after_feature: npm run post-task -- --type=FEATURE --title='Add PDF export' --domains=finance --files=app/server/src/controllers/invoice.ts --why='user requested' --solution='added pdf generation' --severity=MEDIUM
usage.after_schema_change: npm run post-task -- --type=SCHEMA --title='Add returnDeadline to Order' --domains=orders --files=server/prisma/schema.prisma --why='business requirement' --solution='added DateTime field' --severity=HIGH
